subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! The One, the Single, calleth thee from this glorious station. Hearken unto the call of thy Lord, for naught can equal Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد ان الفرد الاحد ینادیک من هذا المقام العزیز ان استمع ندآء ربک انه لا تعادله
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the concourse on high
